title: Bloxd.io
description: An immersive multiplayer block-builder and action sandbox. Form alliances, construct massive fortresses, survive parkour towers, or engage in tactical BedWars, all inside a high-speed web arena.
instructions:
Use WASD keys to move and steer.
Use Spacebar to jump.
Use Left Click to mine/attack, or Right Click to build/place blocks.
Use Shift to run or sneak.
Numbers 1-9 to cycle your hotbar items.
